pageSubtitle: Manage visitor check-ins and active visits

scanner.title: QR Code Scanner
scanner.description: Scan visitor QR codes for quick check-in
scanner.instruction: Point the camera at the visitor's QR code
scanner.error: Failed to read QR code. Please try again.
scanner.permissionDenied: Camera permission denied. Please allow camera access.
scanner.autoModeDesc: Visitors will be checked in immediately after QR scan
scanner.manualModeDesc: Review visitor details before confirming check-in

manual.title: Manual Check-in
manual.description: Enter invitation number or visitor details

activeVisitors.title: Active Visitors
activeVisitors.emptyDesc: Visitors will appear here when they check in.

success.title: Check-in Successful!
success.toastMessage: {{name}} has been checked in successfully. Invitation: {{number}}

error.title: Check-in Error
error.heading: Check-in Failed
error.defaultMessage: Unable to process check-in at this time.

notFound.title: Invitation Not Found
notFound.heading: Invitation Not Found
notFound.description: The scanned QR code does not match any invitation in the system.

tooEarly.title: Too Early - Cannot Check In
tooEarly.description: This visitor is arriving too early.

earlyArrival.title: Early Arrival
earlyArrival.allowedNotice: They can be checked in now, but please notify the host that the visitor has arrived early.

lateArrival.title: Late Arrival
lateArrival.whatHappensTitle: What happens when you check in:

points.recalculateEndTime: Visitor's expected end time will be recalculated based on the scheduled duration
points.adjustedNotifications: Overstay notifications will use the adjusted end time
points.contactHost: Please contact the host to confirm the visitor's arrival

notApproved.title: Not Approved - Cannot Check In
notApproved.description: This invitation must be approved before check-in is allowed.

alreadyCheckedIn.title: Already Checked In
alreadyCheckedIn.description: This visitor has already been checked in at {{time}}

notes.label: Check-in Notes (Optional)
notes.placeholder: Add any notes about this check-in...

placeholders.searchVisitors: Search by name, email, company, or subject...
placeholders.notes: Add any notes about the check-in process...

instructions.byInvitation: Enter the invitation number to search for a specific invitation.
instructions.byVisitor: Search for visitors by name, email, company, or invitation subject.

validation.alreadyCheckedIn: This visitor is already checked in.
validation.notApproved: This invitation is not approved for check-in.
validation.outsideWindow: This invitation is not within the scheduled time window.

errors.notFound: Invitation not found. Please check the number and try again.

qrScanner.tip: Tips: Hold QR code steady within the finder box

scanning.cameraActive: Camera active - Point QR code at camera
scanning.readyForNext: Camera active - Ready for next scan
scanning.scanFailedRetry: Scan failed - Ready to try again

manual.label: QR Code or Invitation Number
manual.placeholder: Scan with hardware scanner or type manually...
manual.hardwareTip: Hardware QR scanners are supported. Just scan and press Enter.

errors.enterCode: Please enter a QR code or invitation number
errors.cameraPermissionDenied: Camera permission denied. Please allow camera access.

instructions.camera: Position the QR code within the finder box. Detection is automatic with beep sound.
instructions.manual: Enter the QR code data or invitation number manually. You can find this on the visitor invitation or printed badge.
